frontmatter.title: On Church's thesis in cubical assemblies
frontmatter.meta: @article{swan-uemura:2022, author = {Swan, Andrew W. and Uemura, Taichi}, publisher = {Cambridge University Press}, year = {2022}, doi = {10.1017/S0960129522000068}, journal = {Mathematical Structures in Computer Science}, pages = {1--20}, title = {On Church's thesis in cubical assemblies}, }
